sudo_password.description: to enable interface detection and routing rules management.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: WireGuard management interface — Manage your VPN interfaces and their peers easily.

setup.title: Setup
setup.description: WireGuard-WUI is a management interface for your WireGuard VPN server.
setup.prompt: Create an admin account to secure access to the tool.

totp.title: Authentication
totp.description: Enter the 6-digit code generated by your authenticator app.

sudo.title: Sudo password
sudo.description: WireGuard-WUI needs the sudo password to run WireGuard commands.

404.title: 404 — Page not found
404.message: The requested page does not exist.

500.title: 500 — Server error
500.retry: Please try again. If the problem persists, check the server logs.

error.interface_name_format: Interface name must follow the format wg0, wg1, etc.
error.ip_cidr_format: IP address must be in CIDR format (e.g. 10.0.0.1/24).
error.port_range: Port must be a number between 1 and 65535.
error.key_generation_failed: Interface "{{nom}}" created in DB but key generation failed (wg genkey). Check that WireGuard is installed.
error.wireguard_start_failed: Interface created in DB but WireGuard error: {{message}}. Check that wg/wg-quick are installed and sudo is configured.
error.config_apply_failed: Error applying configuration: {{message}}. Changes have been reverted.
error.cannot_delete_interface_with_peers: Cannot delete interface "{{nom}}": peers are still associated with it. Remove all peers from this interface first.
error.peer_required_fields: Interface, name and IP address are required.
error.ipv4_format: IP address must be in IPv4 format (e.g. 10.0.0.2).
error.allowed_ips_cidr_format: Allowed IPs must be in CIDR format (e.g. 0.0.0.0/0).
error.dns_ipv4: DNS must be a valid IPv4 address.
error.peer_ip_duplicate: A peer with IP address {{ip}} already exists on this interface.
error.peer_keygen_failed: Peer "{{nom}}" created in DB but key generation failed (wg genkey). Check that WireGuard is installed.
error.peer_wireguard_failed: Peer created in DB but WireGuard error: {{message}}. Check that the interface is active and sudo is configured.
error.name_ip_required: Name and IP address are required.
error.ip_already_used: IP address {{ip}} is already in use on this interface.
error.enter_email_password: Please enter your email and password.
error.first_name_last_name_required: First and last name are required.
error.email_already_used: This email is already in use.
error.new_password_min_length: New password must be at least 8 characters.
error.password_too_weak: Password is too weak. Use uppercase, lowercase, numbers and special characters for a longer password (entropy ≥ 60 bits).
error.no_pending_key: No pending key. Please start over.
error.too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.
error.all_fields_required: All fields are required (password 8 characters min).
error.define_sudo_password_first: Please set the sudo password first.
error.sudo_password_incorrect: Incorrect sudo password. Go to /auth/sudo-password to correct it.
error.qrcode_not_available: QR Code not available. Install with: npm install qrcode

success.no_new_interfaces: No new interfaces or peers detected.

twofactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twofactor.disable_description: Two-factor authentication increases your account security. Enter your password to disable it.
twofactor.enable_description: Add an extra layer of security by enabling two-factor authentication. You will need to enter a 6-digit code from your authenticator app after your password.

admin.title: Administration
admin.debug_description: Enable debug mode to log all detailed operations in logs/app.log.

totp_setup.title: Configure two-factor authentication
totp_setup.scan_description: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.) or enter the key manually.

interface.title: WireGuard Interface
interface.import_description: The following interfaces exist in /etc/wireguard/ but are not yet in the database. Import them to manage them from the web interface.
interface.init_description: Configure your WireGuard interface. Keys will be generated automatically.
interface.port_help: Don't forget to open this port on your router (port forwarding) for remote connections.
interface.endpoint_help_full: Public address (IP or domain) for external access. The port is automatically added. If empty, the tunnel IP is used.
interface.endpoint_help_short: Public address (IP or domain) for external access. The port is automatically added.
interface.routing_impact: Connected peers will not be able to access the network.
interface.confirm_delete: Delete interface {{nom}}? This action is irreversible.

peers.title: Peers
peers.ip_help: Peer IP address on the VPN network (assigned inside the tunnel).
peers.allowed_ips_help: Traffic redirected to the VPN. 0.0.0.0/0 = all traffic (full tunnel). Set the server subnet for split tunnel (e.g. 10.0.0.0/24).
peers.allowed_ips_help_short: Traffic redirected to the VPN. 0.0.0.0/0 = all traffic, or a specific subnet.
peers.dns_help: Use the VPN interface IP if the server acts as a DNS resolver.
peers.ip_help_short: Peer IP address on the VPN network.
peers.no_peers_alert: No peers on interface {{nom}}. Add one with the button above.

qrcode.title: QR Code — {{nom}}
qrcode.description: Scan this QR code with the WireGuard app to add this peer.
